commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And Abner sent messengers to David on his behalf, saying, Whose is the land. saying also, Make your league with me, and, behold, my hand shall be with you, to bring about all Israel unto you. Hebrew may be also "immediately "(Piscator) or "in secret "(Kimchi) as the matter seems not to have transpired. (Calmet) Alexandrian Septuagint, "to Thelam, where he was, without delay, saying, Make "(Haydock) Land. Is it not thine. or have not I the disposal of a great part of it. (Menochius).
